What to ignore on the Warrior roll. Knight-leaning utility skills (Guard Defense, Charge Assault) are fine but not reroll-grade. They become useful if you commit to Knight, but the Warrior roll pool is best used chasing Duelist-side DPS skills.

sections.title: Stop Conditions
sections.content:
Two conditions worth stopping on. Pulling for the perfect roll wastes hours that compound against your progression.

• One named target plus one supporting card. Heavy Impact + Counter Blade. Water Assault + Water to Ice charm. Either pair is enough to commit.

• Three reasonable hits. If you pull three of the named targets above, that account is better than 95% of fresh accounts. Stop and bind it.

Do not chase a Legendary you do not need. The standard banner pity is 70 pulls for a guaranteed Legendary, but you only get roughly 55 pulls during the reroll window. A single bad-luck account does not justify another 20-minute reset cycle.

sections.title: What To Do If You Should Not Reroll
sections.content:
If you ran through the decision tree and the answer was "do not reroll," that is the strong default. The time spent rerolling is better invested elsewhere:

• Push map exploration. Goddess Statues compound. See the Beginner Guide for why this beats every other day-1 activity.

• Redeem the active codes. 13 currently live. Roughly 200 Dawnium, 13 Destiny Fruits, and 13 Stellatie across the standard bundles. Each code takes about 10 seconds.

• Join a guild at level 15. Guild Boss drops include Skill Shard Vouchers, which is the highest-quality skill acquisition path in the early game outside Cinder Ridge.

title: Sword x Staff Void Rifts
excerpt: Biweekly Sunday event that rotates with Chaos Invasion. 10 attempts within 24 hours of spawn, then it disappears until its next rotation. 1-5 chance-progression floors per run for relic pulls up to Mythic. Group play scales rewards for non-whales.
intro:
Void Rifts spawns every other Sunday and rotates with Chaos Invasion — one Sunday is Void Rifts, the next is Chaos Invasion. You get 10 attempts within 24 hours of spawn ; when the window closes the event disappears until its next rotation slot. Attempts do not bank and do not carry across rotations. Burn the full 10 on the day or lose them.

Compact guide to a compact event. Read the TL;DR, knock out the run, move on.

sections.title: How A Run Works
sections.content:
• Find a rift. Markers spawn across every region's overworld map. Region choice does not affect rewards. Contested rifts (another player already inside) lock you out — ride to the next marker.

• Clear floors 1 through 5. After each floor the game rolls whether the rift continues. A clean clear does not guarantee the next floor. Higher floors mean harder enemies and fatter reward pools.

• Walk out with relic pulls. Rarity rolls are independent per pull, so a single run can mix Normal / Epic / Legendary / Mythic. Currency drops scale with how many floors you cleared.

sections.title: Group + Combat Tips
sections.content:
• Group shape: 1 healer + 1 durable frontliner + 2 DPS. Recruit before queuing rather than brute-forcing the first attempt.

• Where to find groups: in-game LFG channel, your guild, friends list, or the official Discord.

• Heal between floors. The gap between floors is your only consistent recovery window. Open every new floor near full HP.

• Swap loadouts when the enemy mix shifts. Freeze build for floor 1–2 mob packs, AoE / single-target swap for floor 3–4 elite-plus-adds. Use the loadout slots from the beginner guide .

• Solo is fine for whales who can deep-clear high floors alone. For everyone else the group bonus more than pays for the coordination cost.

sections.title: Event-Day Checklist
sections.content:
• Log in on the Sunday it spawns. Check rotation against the prior Sunday — if last week was Chaos Invasion, this week is Void Rifts.

• Run all 10 attempts within 24 hours. They disappear when the window closes.

• Recruit before you queue. Healer + frontliner + 2 DPS.

• Aim for 3–4 floor finishes. Floor 5 is bonus, not the goal.

• Skip contested rifts immediately. Next marker rather than waiting.
